title: The Who: Quadrophenia Super Deluxe Edition
original_title: The Who: Quadrophenia Super Deluxe Edition
overview: A five-CD box set of Quadrophenia with a 2011 remaster of the original double album and including two CDs of Pete’s demos and a fifth disc of eight tracks remixed in 5.1 DVD-A surround sound. Limited edition, housed in a hard slip-case.
